text.title: Selling Ideas Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the artefact this methodology produces. Validator enforces required keys + per-field constraints.

list.item: SPIN with any of {situation, problem, implication, need_payoff} empty.
CTA 'let me know' / 'whenever convenient' (no concrete next step).
challenger_insight without 'most teams' or 'data shows' framing.
